About company description: Ko'kcha eshiklar premium is a manufacturer of European-grade interior doors. We work according to quality standards (GOST, ISO), use European technologies, and provide a warranty of up to 10 years.
Wide range of models and color palette: Wide range of models and color palette
Best price-quality ratio description: Wide price range and excellent quality.
Individual approach description: Custom-sized manufacturing, showroom selection, and assistance with configuration.
Free materials and decor description: We provide samples of materials, decor, and printed products.
Installation step 1: Preparing the casings for installation with a cut to match the opening height
Installation step 2: Cutting the frame beam at a 45° angle, assembling the frame with screws
Installation step 3: Cutting the hole for the strike plate on the frame and installing it
Installation step 4: Cutting the hole for the lock/latch and installing the lock/latch
Installation step 5: Cutting the hole for the handle
Installation step 6: Hanging the door leaf onto the frame beam using hinges
Installation finish: The door is ready — all that's left is to secure the block in the opening and install the handle.
For designers and architects description: Kokcha-doors premium closely follows interior design trends. A wide selection of models, finishes, and decor — working with us is convenient and profitable.
Huge selection of models description: We release new door designs every year. The catalog features a wide selection of models, colors, textures, and finish types.
Wide range of decor description: Casings, columns, cornices, capitals, rosettes, and plinths — they complete the look of the door and the entire interior.
Products in various styles description: Baroque, Renaissance, Provence, Classicism, High-tech — the catalog is constantly expanding.

Fast installation description: Installation time reduced by 7 times. Clean installation, factory-cut.
Reliability description: Reinforced door leaf and frame construction. High resistance to mechanical impact.
Sound insulation description: The construction improves sound insulation and preserves the geometry of the door leaf.
